testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-VAL-LOC-INVALID: invalid coords cause redirect back to book page
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-VAL-LOC-INVALID: invalid coords cause redirect back to book page

testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-VAL-TOWING-DROPOFF-INVALID: invalid towing dropoff coords redirect
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-VAL-TOWING-DROPOFF-INVALID: invalid towing dropoff coords redirect

testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-DETAILS-UNAUTHORIZED: user cannot view another user's booking
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-DETAILS-UNAUTHORIZED: user cannot view another user's booking

testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-CANCEL-INVALID-STATE: cannot cancel when not pending/accepted
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-CANCEL-INVALID-STATE: cannot cancel when not pending/accepted

testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-RATE-VALIDATION: missing rating -> 400
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-RATE-VALIDATION: missing rating -> 400

testcase.classname: User booking validations and actions BOOK-RATE-NOT-ALLOWED: cannot rate until service completed and paid
testcase.name: User booking validations and actions BOOK-RATE-NOT-ALLOWED: cannot rate until service completed and paid

testcase.classname: Payment validations and flows VAL-PAY-001: GET /payment/not-an-id redirects to login when unauthenticated
testcase.name: Payment validations and flows VAL-PAY-001: GET /payment/not-an-id redirects to login when unauthenticated

testcase.classname: Payment validations and flows VAL-PAY-004: POST /payment/not-an-id/process returns 400 when logged-in
testcase.name: Payment validations and flows VAL-PAY-004: POST /payment/not-an-id/process returns 400 when logged-in

testcase.classname: Payment validations and flows PAYMENT-PROCESS-OK: valid booking processes with mocked Stripe
testcase.name: Payment validations and flows PAYMENT-PROCESS-OK: valid booking processes with mocked Stripe

testcase.classname: Payment validations and flows SUBSCRIPTION-PREMIUM-INVALID-PLAN: returns 400
testcase.name: Payment validations and flows SUBSCRIPTION-PREMIUM-INVALID-PLAN: returns 400

testcase.classname: Payment validations and flows SUBSCRIPTION-PREMIUM-OK: monthly plan succeeds
testcase.name: Payment validations and flows SUBSCRIPTION-PREMIUM-OK: monthly plan succeeds

testcase.classname: Route guards GUARD-USER: user can access /user routes after login
testcase.name: Route guards GUARD-USER: user can access /user routes after login

testcase.classname: Route guards GUARD-MECHANIC: mechanic without approval redirected to pending approval
testcase.name: Route guards GUARD-MECHANIC: mechanic without approval redirected to pending approval

testcase.classname: Route guards GUARD-ADMIN: non-admin cannot access admin routes
testcase.name: Route guards GUARD-ADMIN: non-admin cannot access admin routes

testcase.classname: Auth & OTP flows AUTH-LOGIN-200: successful login returns JSON and sets session
testcase.name: Auth & OTP flows AUTH-LOGIN-200: successful login returns JSON and sets session

testcase.classname: Auth & OTP flows AUTH-REGISTER-OTP-FLOW: register -> verify OTP creates user
testcase.name: Auth & OTP flows AUTH-REGISTER-OTP-FLOW: register -> verify OTP creates user

testcase.classname: Auth & OTP flows OTP-VERIFY-INVALID: wrong OTP redirects back to verify page
testcase.name: Auth & OTP flows OTP-VERIFY-INVALID: wrong OTP redirects back to verify page

testcase.name: Auth & Guards VAL-AUTH-001: login invalid returns 400

testcase.classname: Auth & Guards VAL-GUARD-001: unauthenticated redirected to login
testcase.name: Auth & Guards VAL-GUARD-001: unauthenticated redirected to login
